title: fix_pipeline_next_decide_fix_response
description: Response schema for the fix_pipeline_next_decide_fix agent that decides how to deliver an already-produced code fix: as inline code suggestions on an existing merge request, or as a commit to a new merge request.

decision.description: Use 'create_fix_on_existing_mr' when a merge request URL is provided AND every file changed by the execution step already appears in the merge request diff. Otherwise use 'create_fix_on_new_mr' — either no merge request URL was provided, or the execution step changed files that are not present in the merge request diff, so a new MR is opened with the fixes.
